issues_outstanding: MeasuringWorth US Wholesale Price URL 404 (2026-05-18); Officer WPI dataset no longer published at MeasuringWorth. Substitute documented (NBER m04051a + BLS WPU00000000) but not yet operationalised in a loader.
HP filter endpoint padding choice undocumented in Shaikh (pre-1900 and post-2010 boundaries); Phase 5 loader must declare.
Projection layer (post-2011 dashed line to 2018/2030) treatment pending: in-CSV 'forecast' flag vs separate registry row.

url_updates.note: MeasuringWorth WPI dataset URL returned 404 (2026-05-18). Substitute: NBER macrohistory m04051a (pre-1947, Warren-Pearson WPI) spliced to BLS WPU00000000 (post-1947). Same bridge used for Ch5 S502/S504.

field_updates.to: The Global Crisis of 2007 in Light of Past Long Waves (HP-smoothed US/UK gold-deflated price indexes)

issues_resolved: Open question 1 (Phase 3): CD2 reference_values column ambiguity — RESOLVED by direct .xlsx inspection. CD2 values are column D (Frequency), not column F (Cumulative-from-Above). Replication target column is F.
Open question 2 (Phase 3): top open-ended bin midpoint convention — RESOLVED. $10M+ has no midpoint in Appendix17_USIRS2011.xlsx and is dropped from the plot.
Open question 2 (Phase 3): CD2 reference_values column ambiguity — RESOLVED by direct .xlsx inspection. CD2 values are column D (Frequency), not column F (Cumulative-from-Above).
issues_outstanding: Open question 1 (Phase 3): Pareto exponent alpha not published by Shaikh; must be recovered numerically by OLS in Phase 5 and reported.

chapter_recommendations_for_main_thread: Apply rename of S1701 in series_registry.json (stub name -> figure-matching name).
Apply URL updates for S1701 (primary -> local file with IA snapshot; extension[0] -> BLS WPU bridge).
Apply reference_values column correction for S1702 and S1703 (FPR017_C3 frequency -> FPR017_C5 survival), with the explicit value mappings above.
Append the adequacy block under each of S1701/S1702/S1703 (score_contributions 30/30/31 = 91 total for Ch17, matches CH17_ADEQUACY_REPORT.total_score).
No registry-row count change; the existing 3-row Ch17 inventory is preserved.
Phase 5 decision: whether to add a 'forecast' column to the S1701 CSV for the dashed projection line, OR split into a separate registry row. Recommend in-CSV flag to keep row count stable.
